creator: skreuzer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for the patch. I have been able to recreate the issue on my end. =
While your patch works,
its not necessary to .include bsd.apache.mk because when other APACHE =
specific knobs are set
this file gets pulled in automagically. I need to take a closer look as =
to how to fix this, but I will modify your patch a little bit.

I apologize for the delay in responding to this. I hope to resolve this =
issue this week.

--
Steven Kreuzer
http://www.exit2shell.com/~skreuzer
